title: Server SME or Architect
description:
**Inclusion without Exception:**  

  

Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) is an equal opportunity employer, and embraces diversity in race, nationality, ethnicity, gender, age, physical ability, neurodiversity, and sexual orientation, to create a workforce that reflects the societies we operate in. Our continued commitment to Culture and Diversity is reflected in our people stories across our workforce and implemented through equitable workplace policies and processes.  

  

**About TCS:**

title: Architect
description:
Meet Benevity
   

  

 Benevity is the way the world does good, providing companies (and their employees) with technology to take social action on the issues they care about. Through giving, volunteering, grantmaking, employee resource groups and micro\-actions, we help most of the Fortune 100 brands build better cultures and use their power for good. We’re also one of the first B Corporations in Canada, meaning we’re as committed to purpose as we are to profits. We have people working all over

title: Practice Architect, Microsoft Copilot/Copilot Studio
description:
**Why You’ll Love Softchoice**
 We are a software\-focused IT solutions and services provider that equips organizations to be agile and innovative, and for their people to be engaged, connected, and creative at work. That means moving them to the cloud, helping them build the workplace of tomorrow, and enabling them to make smarter decisions about their technology. By doing these things we help them create success for their customers and their people.
   

  

 We stand proudly for our people an

 Elevate your career journey by embracing a new challenge with Kinaxis. We are experts in tech, but it’s really our people who give us passion to always seek ways to do things better. As such, we’re serious about your career growth and professional development, because People matter at Kinaxis.

title: Architecte en infonuagique chevronné ou chevronnée (REQ #292)
description:
**Job Description**
**Et si vous pouviez redéfinir ce qui est possible?**
 Avec nous, vous le pouvez. Vous recherchez un but. De la croissance. Des opportunités. Des gens qui comprennent. Nous sommes le foyer des esprits ambitieux, passionnés et innovants. Grâce à une profondeur et une étendue inégalées d’expertise en ingénierie, en consultation et en sciences, nos esprits globaux s’unissent pour offrir des solutions locales. title: Junior Designer
description:
**JUNIOR GRAPHIC DESIGNER**

Full\-time

Calgary or Edmonton

Reports to Brand Manager

Do you love design? Do you love beer and spirits? Do you want to live in a magical world where they are woven together? Come work with us.

**WHO WE ARE**

**Bearhill Brewing**  
Bearhill is a dynamic and growing family of Experience Centers (brewery \& distillery based restaurants with a brand\-focus) dedicated to creating community cornerstones, quality craft beer, spirits, and locally inspired experiences.

title: Junior Designer
description:
Are you ambitious and looking to make the right move in your career? Now is the perfect time to join Egis. Egis is experiencing substantial growth in North America, now made up of over 1,000 engineers, architects and planners across Canada and the USA. This strategic move underscores our commitment to investing in North America, propelling our expansion to new heights.
   

  





 Our values showcase everything we believe in:
   

  





**A Responsible Company** 
 \- We care about people, an

title: Structural Buildings Technologist
description:
Are you a Structural Technologist who defines success as “a great model and drawings for an interesting project?” Are you interested in working on landmark buildings that help define your community? Are you a skilled Revit user with a positive attitude and a strong desire to stay ahead of the curve? Whether you are a new grad, or someone looking for that next step in your career, we want to hear from you!
  
This requisition will be used to fill up to 2 positions across our offices in Calgary an

title: Maximo Technical Consultant/Architect
description:
**Introduction**
 A career in IBM Consulting is built on long\-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and
